# Size Guide

The size guide provided in apparel listings offers measurements in both inches and centimetres, reflecting the dimensions of the garment when laid flat. For customers whose measurements fall between two sizes, it is advised to size up for outerwear and size down for fitted base layers.

[Source: product_information.md#size-guide]
